cases.title: Prisma singleton with Neon adapter
cases.prompt: Set up the Prisma client for a Next.js app deployed on Vercel using Neon as the database. Show the singleton pattern that prevents connection exhaustion in dev and uses the serverless adapter in prod.

cases.title: Service layer — no raw Prisma in actions
cases.prompt: Create a `postService` with findById, create, and softDelete methods. Then show a Server Action that uses the service — never importing Prisma directly. Include typed select shapes with Prisma.validator.

mustAvoid: import { prisma } from '@/lib/db' in action file

cases.title: Multi-step transaction with rollback
cases.prompt: Implement a `publishPost` function that in a single transaction: marks a post as PUBLISHED, upserts the tags, and links them via the join table. If any step fails, the whole operation rolls back.

cases.title: Never expose sensitive fields
cases.prompt: A User model has `passwordHash` and `twoFactorSecret`. Show a service method that returns user data to the client — it must never include those fields. Use explicit select with Prisma types, not manual omission.

cases.title: Cursor-based pagination
cases.prompt: Implement a paginated `findMany` for posts (published only, soft-delete filtered). Return items, hasMore, and nextCursor. Cap results at 100. Never use offset pagination.
